title: Dto Graph Search
description: Client-side type for **Dto Graph Search**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.
context: Client-side type for **Dto Graph Search**, kept in parity with the matching `api:dto-*` spec so remote and embedded Studio render the same JSON the API emits.

rules.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
rules: Field names, optional/required semantics, and nesting MUST match the paired `api:dto-*` spec. The client MUST NOT invent alternate property names.

rules.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
rules: DTO types MUST be imported from a shared package or generated from the same schema source used by API presenters and OpenAPI.

rules.requirement: symbol hits use reusable graph symbol refs
rules:
The client DTO for graph search symbol hits MUST reuse
[`client:dto-graph-symbol-ref`](../dto-graph-symbol-ref/spec.md) for the nested `symbol` payload
rather than declaring duplicate location fields inline.

The client DTO MUST also preserve graph-search preview fields on both symbol and spec hits:

- `snippet`
- `startLine`
- `endLine`

constraints: HTTP handlers MUST NOT import @specd/core from @specd/ui or @specd/client.
v1 server auth: api.auth.type from specd.yaml (never studio.*); registry registers only disabled; no server-side Bearer enforcement on loopback or specd ui serve.
Artifact save/load MUST use core:save-change-artifact and core:get-change-artifact — not raw ChangeRepository.saveArtifact from HTTP handlers.
There is no GET /changes/{name}/validation resource; use GET .../status and POST .../validate.
Canonical workspace spec artifacts are read-only in Studio v1.

scenarios.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
scenarios.name: Client type fields match API DTO
when: TypeScript compiles client against paired api:dto-*

scenarios.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
scenarios.name: Sample API JSON parses without renaming
then: no custom field aliases in adapter

scenarios.requirement: client DTO matches API wire shape
scenarios.name: Drift fails client compile or test
when: API DTO adds required field without client update

scenarios.requirement: symbol hits use reusable graph symbol refs
scenarios.name: Client deserializes nested symbol refs without duplicate fields
given: API JSON with graph search symbol hits
then: AND the client does not declare duplicate inline location fields for search hits

scenarios.requirement: symbol hits use reusable graph symbol refs
scenarios.name: Client preserves graph-search preview fields
given: API JSON with snippet, startLine, and endLine
then: those fields remain available on symbol and spec hits
AND Studio can render previews directly from the DTO

scenarios.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
scenarios.name: Types imported from shared package

scenarios.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
scenarios.name: OpenAPI generation feeds both sides
then: AND Studio release notes document changes

scenarios.requirement: types are shared or generated from API schemas
scenarios.name: Manual duplicate DTO is rejected in review
when: contributor adds parallel interface in client
